name: usb-device-viewer
description: 跨平台USB HID设备查看工具

scripts.start: bun run vite:build && bun run ./node_modules/.bin/electrobun dev
scripts.build: bun run vite:build && bun run ./node_modules/.bin/electrobun build
scripts.dev: DEV_SERVER=http://localhost:5174 concurrently -k -n vite,app -c cyan,magenta "bun run vite:dev" "sleep 2 && bun run ./node_modules/.bin/electrobun dev"
